message:
refactor(viewer): extract helpers and fs_handler to sub-modules

Split viewer.zig into modular structure:
- viewer/mod.zig: module entry point
- viewer/helpers.zig: utility functions (env vars, parsing, MIME types)
- viewer/fs_handler.zig: File System Access API handlers

Reduces viewer.zig from 2540 to 2365 lines while improving organization.
